records.question: Who is the female superhero named Frigga with a Good alignment, race exactly '-', weighing at most 167.0 kg and no taller than 180.0 cm?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE race.race = '-' AND gender.gender = 'Female' AND superhero.weight_kg <= 167.0 AND superhero.height_cm <= 180.0 AND alignment.alignment = 'Good' AND superhero.full_name = 'Frigga'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT superhero.id
FROM superhero
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE superhero.superhero_name = 'Frigga'
  AND gender.gender = 'Female'
  AND alignment.alignment = 'Good'
  AND race.race = '-'
  AND superhero.weight_kg <= 167
  AND superhero.height_cm <= 180

records.question: Which superheroes that have related alignment, eye colour, hair colour, and skin colour records all referencing the same colour, as well as related publisher and hero_attribute records, have the full name exactly equal to 'Victor Fries' and the superhero name exactly equal to 'Mister Freeze'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN hero_attribute ON superhero.id = hero_attribute.hero_id
WHERE superhero.full_name = 'Victor Fries' AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Mister Freeze'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT superhero.id
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN colour AS eye_colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = eye_colour.id
JOIN colour AS hair_colour ON superhero.hair_colour_id = hair_colour.id
JOIN colour AS skin_colour ON superhero.skin_colour_id = skin_colour.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN hero_attribute ON superhero.id = hero_attribute.hero_id
WHERE superhero.full_name = 'Victor Fries'
  AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Mister Freeze'
  AND eye_colour.id = hair_colour.id
  AND hair_colour.id = skin_colour.id

records.question: Which male superheroes from DC Comics have no colour for their eyes, hair, and skin, weigh at most 113.0 kg, and have a good alignment?

SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE publisher.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' AND colour.colour = 'No Colour' AND superhero.weight_kg <= 113.0 AND gender.gender = 'Male' AND alignment.alignment = 'Good'

JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id

  AND s.eye_colour_id IS NULL
  AND s.hair_colour_id IS NULL
  AND s.skin_colour_id IS NULL
  AND s.weight_kg <= 113
  AND a.alignment = 'good'

JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE alignment.alignment = 'Good' AND race.race = 'Human' AND superhero.full_name = 'Stephen Vincent Strange' AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Doctor Strange' AND superhero.height_cm >= 188.0 AND superhero.weight_kg <= 81.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT superhero.id
FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE alignment.alignment = 'Good'
  AND race.race = 'Human'
  AND superhero.full_name = 'Stephen Vincent Strange'
  AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Doctor Strange'
  AND superhero.height_cm >= 188
  AND superhero.weight_kg <= 81

records.question: Which male superheroes named Vulture have the full name Adrian Toomes, are human, bad-aligned, published by Marvel Comics, at most 180.0 cm tall, and weigh at least 79.0 kg?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE superhero.full_name = 'Adrian Toomes' AND superhero.height_cm <= 180.0 AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND race.race = 'Human' AND superhero.weight_kg >= 79.0 AND gender.gender = 'Male' AND alignment.alignment = 'Bad' AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Vulture'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT superhero.id
FROM superhero
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE superhero.superhero_name = 'Vulture'
  AND superhero.full_name = 'Adrian Toomes'
  AND gender.gender = 'Male'
  AND race.race = 'Human'
  AND alignment.alignment = 'Bad'
  AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
  AND superhero.height_cm <= 180
  AND superhero.weight_kg >= 79

records.question: Which superheroes have the superhero name exactly 'Cerebra' and the full name exactly 'Shakti Haddad', have an alignment with the alignment exactly 'Good', and also have recorded related colour, publisher, and hero_attribute records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN hero_attribute ON superhero.id = hero_attribute.hero_id
WHERE superhero.superhero_name = 'Cerebra' AND superhero.full_name = 'Shakti Haddad' AND alignment.alignment = 'Good'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.id
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN colour ec ON s.eye_colour_id = ec.id
JOIN colour hc ON s.hair_colour_id = hc.id
JOIN colour sc ON s.skin_colour_id = sc.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
WHERE s.superhero_name = 'Cerebra'
  AND s.full_name = 'Shakti Haddad'
  AND a.alignment = 'Good'

records.question: What superheroes named Thundra, who have a full name of Thundra, weigh at most 158.0 kg, stand at least 218.0 cm tall, belong to the race '-', and whose alignment is Good?

JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id

JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id

records.question: Which male superhero named Robert Bruce Banner, also known as Hulk, is exactly 630.0 kg, no more than 244.0 cm tall, has green eyes, hair, and skin, is good aligned, and of the Human / Radiation race?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT superhero.id FROM superhero
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.hair_colour_id = colour.id AND superhero.skin_colour_id = colour.id
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE gender.gender = 'Male' AND superhero.weight_kg = 630.0 AND colour.colour = 'Green' AND superhero.full_name = 'Robert Bruce Banner' AND superhero.height_cm <= 244.0 AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Hulk' AND alignment.alignment = 'Good' AND race.race = 'Human / Radiation'

FROM superhero

JOIN colour eye_colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = eye_colour.id
JOIN colour hair_colour ON superhero.hair_colour_id = hair_colour.id
JOIN colour skin_colour ON superhero.skin_colour_id = skin_colour.id
JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
JOIN race ON superhero.race_id = race.id
WHERE superhero.full_name = 'Robert Bruce Banner'
  AND superhero.superhero_name = 'Hulk'

  AND eye_colour.colour = 'Green'

  AND skin_colour.colour = 'Green'
  AND alignment.alignment = 'Good'
